messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'gradStops'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [gradStops, isDark]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'closeMenu' and 'menuOpen'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [closeMenu, menuOpen, pathname]
